creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Tue Mar 12 22:15:14 2013
New Revision: 314003
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314003

Log:
  - Makefile tweaks
  - Add Icons
  
  PR:		ports/173354
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/Makefile
  head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/distinfo
  head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/files/barbie_seahorse_adventures.in

Modified: head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/Makefile	Tue Mar 12 21:56:11 2013	(r314002)
+++ head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/Makefile	Tue Mar 12 22:15:14 2013	(r314003)
@@ -1,7 +1,5 @@
 # Created by:	nemysis@gmx.ch
-#
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	barbie_seahorse_adventures
 PORTVERSION=	1.0
@@ -10,9 +8,8 @@ CATEGORIES=	games python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.imitationpickles.org/barbie/files/ \
 		SF/nemysisfreebsdp/:icons
 DISTFILES=	barbie-${DISTVERSION}${EXTRACT_SUFX} \
-		${PORTNAME}.png:icons
+		${PORTNAME}_icons.tar.gz:icons
 DIST_SUBDIR=	python
-EXTRACT_ONLY=	barbie-${DISTVERSION}${EXTRACT_SUFX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	nemysis@gmx.ch
 COMMENT=	You are a seahorse and you want to go to the moon!
@@ -26,12 +23,11 @@ WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/barbie-${DISTVERSION}
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/${PORTNAME} \
-		share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png
-
-PORTDATA=	 *
 PORTDOCS=	CHANGES.txt LEVELS.txt NOTES.txt README.txt TODO.txt
 
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+ICON_SIZES=	32x32 48x48 64x64 72x72 96x96
+
 SUB_FILES=	${PORTNAME}
 
 DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Barbie Seahorse Adventures" "${COMMENT}" "${PORTNAME}" \
@@ -42,14 +38,21 @@ DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Barbie Seahorse Adventu
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's,/usr/bin/python,${PYTHON_CMD},' \
 		${WRKSRC}/leveledit.py ${WRKSRC}/tileedit.py
-	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${RM} *.py.bak)
+	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name "*.bak" -delete
 
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin
 	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/*.py ${DATADIR}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "data lib" ${DATADIR})
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/${PORTNAME}.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps
+
+post-install:
+.for s in ${ICON_SIZES}
+	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/icons/hicolor/${s}/apps
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}_${s}.png \
+		${PREFIX}/share/icons/hicolor/${s}/apps/${PORTNAME}.png
+.endfor
+	${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/${PORTNAME}.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}

Modified: head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/distinfo	Tue Mar 12 21:56:11 2013	(r314002)
+++ head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/distinfo	Tue Mar 12 22:15:14 2013	(r314003)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 SHA256 (python/barbie-1.0.tar.gz) = 8a5312545e51b94a28194679b2a8b8a7558ac105b706fe07ccabab6d47537861
 SIZE (python/barbie-1.0.tar.gz) = 2172446
-SHA256 (python/barbie_seahorse_adventures.png) = 98b6052da805e533b38ed4b47116b208d8c253ec5cf2bd630a87d311a35488c1
-SIZE (python/barbie_seahorse_adventures.png) = 519
+SHA256 (python/barbie_seahorse_adventures_icons.tar.gz) = fa19defbd017b8b80f672327faa69ce694f56760b9478cb32f365804a57bd280
+SIZE (python/barbie_seahorse_adventures_icons.tar.gz) = 16896

Modified: head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/files/barbie_seahorse_adventures.in
==============================================================================
--- head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/files/barbie_seahorse_adventures.in	Tue Mar 12 21:56:11 2013	(r314002)
+++ head/games/barbie_seahorse_adventures/files/barbie_seahorse_adventures.in	Tue Mar 12 22:15:14 2013	(r314003)
@@ -3,4 +3,4 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 cd "%%DATADIR%%"
-exec ./run_game.py "${@}"
+exec /usr/bin/env python ./run_game.py "${@}"
